# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ApiInterface Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-apiinterface.html): Defines the RESTful contract and live execution environment for API interactions. Architectural overview of the ApiInterface domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Documentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-documentation.html): Manages the structural layout and content delivery of the technical documentation site. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
